title: CBB Regulatory Sandbox Framework
summary: Allows CBB licensees, startups and FinTech firms to test technology-based financial solutions, including crypto, blockchain, tokenisation and other Web3 models, while preserving core AML, customer confidentiality, client money, risk disclosure, reporting, onboarding and exit obligations.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.blockchain_web3: Controlled testing framework for innovative financial services.
theme_notes.digital_finance.fintech_sandboxes: Controlled testing framework for innovative financial services.

notes: Related instruments: Updated by later CBB sandbox framework material and related FinHub973 initiatives
